ptSource: Published Helmholtz EOS: Akasaka & Lemmon (2023), International Journal of Thermophysics 44, 166.

primarySources.citation: Akasaka, R. and Lemmon, E.W. (2023), "A Helmholtz Energy Equation of State for cis-1-Chloro-2,3,3,3-tetrafluoro-1-propene [R-1224yd(Z)]", International Journal of Thermophysics 44, 166.
primarySources.scope: Fundamental EOS valid from triple-point T (157.8 K) to 473 K, pressures up to 35 MPa. Includes vapor-pressure ancillary equation suitable for PT chart generation.
primarySources.note: Also implemented in NIST REFPROP 10.0 as 'R1224YDZ'.

primarySources.citation: Sotani, T. et al. (2022), "Saturation vapour pressure measurements of refrigerant R1224yd(Z) from 274 K to 338 K", International Journal of Refrigeration.
primarySources.scope: Static-method vapor pressure measurements at INRIM, 274-338 K, precision capacitance manometer (full scale 0.5 MPa). Used to validate Akasaka & Lemmon (2023) EOS.
Manufacturer-published PT table and P-h diagram covering the operating range. Free download from AGC Chemicals website.
